artPrompt: A robed human cleric behind a humble candle-lit stall offering a small cold-gold token of forgiveness, a kindly tired face haloed in soft light, guttering candles and drifting ash framing the booth, the apocalyptic clock tower hazy in the blood-dark distance, bone-white and deep-black robes, a tender mercantile melancholy, rendered as soft pastel impressionism — hazy diffuse light, visible chalky texture, gentle gradients, dreamy muted color.
name: Indulgence Vendor
text: {1}, {T}: You gain 2 life and remove a doom counter from the Doomsday Clock. Sin forgiven, processing fees apply.
flavorText: "Salvation is free. The paperwork is forty dollars."
